arts.ttl: ‘Destined to remain’ – Arsenal have ‘no intention of selling’ player in January despite receiving offers
arts.sum: On December 16th, we covered claims from Italy which stated Arsenal’s Jakub Kiwior has requested his agent to find a new club in the winter market. Two days later, Corriere del Mezzogiorno said the Gunners have opened the door for the defender to leave and he’s likelier to leave the Emirates. arts.ttl: ‘I expect’: David Ornstein shares what he now thinks is going to happen with Marcus Rashford at Man Utd
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford has been dominating the headlines in recent weeks. Rashford is ready to leave Manchester United as he looks for a new challenge away...

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim singles out 'special' Arsenal star as Mikel Arteta shares concerns
arts.sum: Manchester United travel to Arsenal in the third round of the FA Cup on Sunday and Red Devils boss Ruben Amorim believes one Gunners star in particular will cause his side problems

arts.ttl: I swapped Man Utd for Chelsea like Kobbie Mainoo could – I made a huge mistake
arts.sum: Kobbie Mainoo is reportedly frustrated over his Manchester United contract stalemate but has attracted interest from Premier League rivals Chelsea in the January transfer window

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford's 'dream' club line up loan move for Man Utd star
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford's Man Utd future appears increasingly uncertain.

arts.ttl: Pundit makes ‘mincemeat’ of Manchester United player over battle for unpaid wages
arts.sum: Manchester United’s Antony has approached the Dutch football association [KNVB] over unpaid wages from Ajax, according to ESPN NL. The winger has been involved in a dispute with the Eredivisie side over the last two years and approached the KNVB arbitration committee six months ago. arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim will pick ‘best’ Manchester United team for Arsenal FA Cup clash
arts.sum: United boss Amorim confirmed Altay Bayindir would replace Andre Onana in goal for Sunday’s blockbuster match at the Emirates Stadium.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim receives Mikel Arteta message with Man United stance backed
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim has been told that he has a similar task of rebuilding Manchester United as Mikel Arteta had with Arsenal when he arrived at the Emirates Stadium in 2019

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim must make key Manchester United change to avoid Arsenal repeat
arts.sum: United have recent history with Arsenal and know what they must avoid at the Emirates Stadium

arts.ttl: Amorim handed transfer BOOST in Man Utd pursuit of new left-back
arts.sum: Malacia has only played 92 Premier League minutes since returning from a long-term injury in November and United would be open to his departure for the right price. The Dutchman’s current deal has 18 months remaining on it and, while United have an option to extend for a further year, there is an acceptance that trying to recoup the €15 million spent on him would be an ideal outcome.
